description.en: React to an incident event: a triage agent assesses it, the on-duty role is asked to acknowledge with hourly reminders, and an unacknowledged incident escalates to a second role after 4 hours. The final status is announced.
description.de: Reagiert auf ein Vorfall-Event: Ein Triage-Agent bewertet es, die Bereitschaftsrolle wird mit stündlichen Erinnerungen um Bestätigung gebeten, und ein unbestätigter Vorfall eskaliert nach 4 Stunden an eine zweite Rolle. Der finale Status wird verkündet.

steps.prompt: An incident event arrived. Assess its impact and urgency from the event payload: {{ctx.summary}}. Produce a short triage note with a recommended first action.

human.message: Incident reported: {{ctx.summary}}. Triage note: {{steps.triage.text}}. Please acknowledge that you are handling it.
Escalation: the incident ({{ctx.summary}}) was not acknowledged by the on-duty role within 4 hours. Please take over. Triage note: {{steps.triage.text}}

steps.prompt: Announce the incident handling status: who acknowledged or took over the incident ({{ctx.summary}}) and what happens next.

description.en: Agent that assesses the incoming incident and writes the triage note.
description.de: Agent, der den eingehenden Vorfall bewertet und die Triage-Notiz schreibt.

description.en: Agent that announces the final incident handling status.
description.de: Agent, der den finalen Bearbeitungsstatus des Vorfalls verkündet.

description.en: Role asked to acknowledge the incident first.
description.de: Rolle, die den Vorfall zuerst bestätigen soll.

description.en: Role that takes over when the on-duty role misses the 4-hour deadline.
description.de: Rolle, die übernimmt, wenn die Bereitschaftsrolle die 4-Stunden-Frist verpasst.

description.en: Catalog event that starts a run of this workflow.
description.de: Katalog-Event, das einen Lauf dieses Workflows startet.

description.en: Channel used to reach the on-duty and escalation roles.
description.de: Kanal, über den Bereitschafts- und Eskalationsrolle erreicht werden.
